message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

package "ML API Adapter Service" as ML {
    actor "ML-API-ADAPTER" as adapter
}

package "Central Services" as CS {
    boundary "Central Service API" as api
    usecase "Participant Handler" as handler
    database "Participant DAO" as dao
    database "Central Store" as store
}

rectangle "Get Callback Details" as main {
    adapter -> api : 1 Request to get callback details - GET - /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
    
    activate api
    api -> handler : 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant
    activate handler
    
    handler -> dao : 3 Fetch Participant\nError code: 3200
    activate dao
    dao -> store : 4 Fetch Participant
    activate store
    store --> dao : 5 Retrieved Participant
    deactivate store
    dao --> handler : 6 Return Participant
    deactivate dao
    
    handler -> handler : 7 Validate DFSP
    
    alt Validate participant (success)
        handler -> handler : 8 check if "type" parameter is sent
        
        alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)
            handler -> dao : 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type\nError code: 3000
            activate dao
            
            dao -> store : 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
            activate store
            note right of store: Condition:\nisActive = 1\n[endpointTypeId = <type>]
            store --> dao : 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
            deactivate store
            
            dao --> handler : 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
            deactivate dao
            
            note right of handler: Message:\n{\n  endpoints: {type: <type>, value: <value>}\n}
            
            handler -> api : 13 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate handler
            api -> adapter : 14 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate api
            
        else Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)
            handler -> dao : 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant\nError code: 3000
            activate dao
            
            dao -> store : 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
            activate store
            note right of store: Condition:\nisActive = 1
            store --> dao : 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
            deactivate store
            
            dao --> handler : 18 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate dao
            
            note right of handler: Message:\n{\n  endpoints: [\n    {type: <type>, value: <value>},\n    {type: <type>, value: <value>}\n  ]\n}
            
            handler -> api : 19 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate handler
            api -> adapter : 20 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate api
        end
        
    else Validate participant (failure)/ Error
        note right of handler: Validation failure/ Error!
        note right of handler: Message:\n{\n  "errorInformation": {\n    "errorCode": <errorCode>,\n    "errorDescription": <ErrorMessage>\n  }\n}
        
        handler -> api : 21 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
        deactivate handler
        api -> adapter : 22 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
        deactivate api
    end
}

@enduml
```
